title: Add nested-path field extractor to secretx-core
description: The Vault KV v2 GET response is nested: {"data":{"data":{...},"metadata":{...}}}. The existing json_extract_string_field only handles flat objects. To replace vaultrs with raw HTTP we need a way to navigate data.data and extract either (a) the full inner JSON object or (b) a specific field within it, all without serde_json allocations. Options: extend json_extract_string_field with a path argument, or add a new json_extract_object function that returns the raw bytes of a nested object value. Either approach touches secretx-core and must preserve the zeroization guarantee.
